headline: Micron, Alphabet, Builders FirstSource, Sunrun, Wendy’s, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Stocks moved higher Wednesday as artificial-intelligence stocks steadied. While AI names weren’t necessarily rising during the session, there weren’t steep declines either, and stocks in many other sectors were leading the gains.  Micron Technology  fell 0.7%.  Reuters reported Qualcomm was in talks to provide custom chips for TikTok owner ByteDance.
